findings.message: No RLS database current_tenant_id binding or active schema guard found in apps/web.
findings.rootCause: Omission of PostgreSQL active session tenant validation.
findings.recommendation: Ensure set_active_session_tenant is bound to withTenantContext.

findings.message: No edge-optimized India PAN/Aadhaar scrubbing filters or redact identifiers found in route handlers.
findings.rootCause: Failure to scrub litigation telemetry streams before logs are emitted.
findings.recommendation: Implement scrubPII inside core endpoint controllers.

findings.message: Illegal package boundary crossing. Monorepo packages must be imported via workspace exports instead of relative paths.
findings.rootCause: Manual relative import of isolated sibling packages.

findings.message: Forbidden navigation token 'javascript:void(0)' found in high-focus sidebar.
findings.rootCause: Dummy hash link or javascript:void(0) used as a placeholder in navigation.
findings.recommendation: Map navigation click target cleanly to absolute active page indices.
